odbc-desc: {{desc|what=provides ODBC database connectivity and query capabilities for MediaWiki}}
odbc-error-unknown-source:
Error message when a source ID is not found in configuration.

Parameters:
* $1 - the source ID
odbc-error-connect-failed:
Error message when connection fails.

Parameters:
* $1 - the source ID
* $2 - the error details
odbc-error-arbitrary-not-allowed: Error message when arbitrary SQL is blocked by configuration.
odbc-error-no-source: Error message when no source parameter is provided.
odbc-error-no-from: Error message when no from (table) parameter is provided.
odbc-error-no-template: Error message when no template parameter is provided for display_odbc_table.
odbc-error-no-prepared:
Error message when no prepared statements are configured.

Parameters:
* $1 - the source ID
odbc-error-prepared-not-found:
Error message when a named prepared statement is not found.

Parameters:
* $1 - the statement name
* $2 - the source ID
odbc-error-empty-query: Error message when an empty query is submitted.
odbc-error-prepare-failed:
Error message when statement preparation fails.

Parameters:
* $1 - the ODBC driver error message
odbc-error-execute-failed:
Error message when statement execution fails.

Parameters:
* $1 - the ODBC driver error message
odbc-error-query-failed:
Error message when a direct query fails.

Parameters:
* $1 - the ODBC driver error message
odbc-error-illegal-input:
Error message when dangerous SQL patterns are detected.

Parameters:
* $1 - the illegal pattern
* $2 - the parameter name
odbc-error-permission: Error message when user lacks permission to run ODBC queries.
odbc-error-too-many-queries:
Error message when a page exceeds the per-page {{#odbc_query:}} call limit set by $wgODBCMaxQueriesPerPage.

Parameters:
* $1 - the configured maximum number of queries per page
odbc-error-admin-select-only: Error message when a non-SELECT query is submitted via the admin interface.
odbc-error-identifier-too-long:
Error message when an SQL identifier exceeds maximum length.

Parameters:
* $1 - the context (e.g., 'column name', 'table name')
odbc-error-invalid-identifier:
Error message when an SQL identifier contains invalid characters.

Parameters:
* $1 - the invalid identifier
* $2 - the context
odbc-ed-error-illegal:
Error message for the External Data connector when SQL injection patterns are detected.

Parameters:
* $1 - the illegal pattern
* $2 - the parameter context
odbc-error-invalid-token: Error message when CSRF token validation fails.
odbc-test-success:
Success message when a connection test passes.

Parameters:
* $1 - the source ID
odbc-admin-intro: Introductory text on the ODBC admin page.
odbc-admin-no-sources: Message displayed when no ODBC sources are configured.
odbc-admin-col-name: Table header: Column name in the column browser.
odbc-admin-col-type: Table header: SQL data type of the column (e.g. VARCHAR, INT).
odbc-admin-col-size: Table header: Column size or precision as reported by the ODBC driver.
odbc-admin-col-nullable: Table header: Whether the column accepts NULL values (YES, NO, or empty if unknown).
odbc-admin-action-test: Link text for testing a connection.
odbc-admin-action-query: Link text for the test query form.
odbc-admin-test-title:
Page title for connection test results.

Parameters:
* $1 - the source ID
odbc-admin-tables-title:
Page title for table listing.

Parameters:
* $1 - the source ID
odbc-admin-no-tables: Message when no tables are found.
odbc-admin-columns-title:
Page title for column listing.

Parameters:
* $1 - the table name
* $2 - the source ID
odbc-admin-no-columns: Message when no columns are found for a table.
odbc-admin-query-title:
Page title for the query form.

Parameters:
* $1 - the source ID
odbc-admin-query-intro: Instructions for the test query form.
odbc-admin-query-sql: Label for displaying the executed query.
odbc-admin-query-run: Label for the submit button on the query form.
odbc-admin-query-results-title:
Page title for query results.

Parameters:
* $1 - the source ID
odbc-admin-query-row-count:
Row count message.

Parameters:
* $1 - the number of rows
odbc-admin-back: Link text to go back to the source list.
